summary:
✅ **Fixed!** The test passes now.

**The bug:** In `Product.java:32`, the `hashCode()` method was returning `category.hashCode()` instead of `sku.hashCode()`. Since there are only ~10 categories but 10,000+ products, all products in the same category hashed to the same bucket, creating chains of length ~1000.

**The fix:** Changed line 32 to return `sku.hashCode()` instead, so each unique product distributes to a different bucket.

**Test results after fix:**
- Max chain length: 4 (was 1000) ✓
- Non-empty buckets: 36.6% (was 0.1%) ✓
- Distribution is now even across buckets ✓
